{{Quote|Golov Nakhym and his supporters are to be tried in Alliance courts for multiple felonies. Anyone with knowledge of this group's previous activities, please contact: Prosecutor Resinn, CRS Independence.|E-mail from Alliance High Command|<ref name="XWA" />}}
'''Resinn''' was a [[Lawyer/Legends|prosecutor]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who served aboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]<ref name="XWA" /> in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Resinn led the prosecution of the [[Hurrim]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] leader [[Golov Nakhym]] after he was [[Battle of Hurrim Base|arrested]] by Alliance forces for opening fire on civilian [[Starship/Legends|ships]] during a joint raid on an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]]. In preparation for the case, [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] sent an [[e-mail]] to all personnel requesting anybody with information on the Hurrim's previous activities to contact Resinn.<ref name="XWA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Resinn was created for the [[1999]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''. The character does not appear in the game but is mentioned in an e-mail sent to the player character, [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]].<ref name="XWA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
